summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Vivah matrimonial app authentication features. All UI components, data-testid attributes, form validation, protected routes, and responsive layout working correctly. No critical JavaScript errors found.

authentication_issues.issue: Cannot test actual authentication flow without valid Supabase email configuration or test credentials
authentication_issues.impact: Unable to test authenticated features beyond form validation
authentication_issues.workaround: Need Supabase email settings configured or test credentials provided

passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with Google OAuth button and email/password form
Signup page loads correctly with Google OAuth button and email/password form
Google OAuth button visually present with Google logo SVG on both pages
OR separator between Google and email login exists on both pages
Navigation between login and signup pages works correctly
Unauthenticated users redirected to login when accessing protected routes (/browse, /interests, /chat, /admin)
Login page responsive layout - card centers correctly on mobile, tablet, and desktop
Signup page password validation (min 6 chars) working correctly
Signup page password match validation working correctly
No TypeScript or JavaScript console errors on any page
All required data-testid attributes exist: button-google-login, button-google-signup, button-login, button-signup, input-email, input-password, input-confirm-password, link-signup, link-login
Protected route authentication guards working properly
Responsive design working across mobile (390x844), tablet (768x1024), and desktop (1920x1080) viewports
Form validation error messages display correctly
UI components render without visual issues
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Configure Supabase email settings to allow test account creation or provide test credentials for deeper authentication testing. 2. Run Supabase migration script (/app/supabase-migration-v2.sql) to create new tables (user_blocks, reports, notifications) if not already done. 3. Consider providing test credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md for future testing iterations.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All UI components, validation, routing, and responsive design working correctly. Only missing actual authentication testing due to Supabase configuration
